q: How long does it take to build a Shopify store?
a: Most Shopify stores take 7–14 working days depending on the number of products, custom sections, and integrations. I share a clear timeline before we begin and keep you updated at every milestone.

q: What do I need to provide for a graphic design project?
a: Just your brand details, any existing logo or colour preferences, and a few reference styles you like. I handle everything else — concepts, revisions, and final production-ready files in every format you need.

q: What are your typical project timelines?
a: Logos take 3–5 days, social media kits 4–7 days, and full websites 1–3 weeks. Rush delivery is available on request when your launch date is tight.
Pricing is fixed per project and quoted upfront based on scope — no hidden charges or surprises. As a GST-registered business, you receive a proper invoice for every engagement.

q: Do you provide support after the project is delivered?
a: Yes. Every project includes post-launch support, and I offer optional maintenance plans for Shopify and WordPress sites so your store always stays healthy.
Each project includes up to 3 rounds of revisions to make sure the final result matches your vision perfectly. Additional revision rounds can always be added if you need them.
